sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Little Samson
notes: Music composition credited to Kazuhide Sasuga with co-credit to Yukimari (Japanese version). Sound driver attribution: Tsukasa Masuko (former composer/programmer at Atlus Co., Ltd.). No detailed track-level data (tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, energy levels) documented in available sources. No SFX characteristics documented in available sources. Game features a hidden sound test accessible via password 'NB50' (KAZU in Japanese version).
